products.name: Alpha Tee
products.desc: The everyday standard. Boxy, heavyweight, and built to outlast a season of wear.
products.details: 220gsm heavyweight cotton. Boxy fit, dropped shoulder. Garment-washed for a lived-in feel from day one.
products.care: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print.

products.name: Guardian Hoodie
products.desc: A structured heavyweight hoodie built to stand guard. Brushed interior, boxed fit, and hardware that holds. The cornerstone of the drop.
products.details: 380gsm heavyweight cotton fleece. Ribbed cuffs and hem. Embroidered SCCC mark. Relaxed, boxed fit — size down for a trimmer look.
products.care: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print.

products.name: Pack Leader Tee
products.desc: Front-and-back graphic on the same heavyweight build. Made for the one who leads the pack.
products.details: 220gsm heavyweight cotton. Boxy fit. Front and back screen print. Garment-washed, true to size.
products.care: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print.

products.name: SCCC Cap
products.desc: A structured 6-panel cap that finishes the fit. Embroidered mark, adjustable strap.
products.details: Structured 6-panel construction. Embroidered SCCC wordmark. Adjustable strap, curved brim.
products.care: Spot clean only. Do not machine wash.

products.name: Corso Crewneck
products.desc: Premium fleece crewneck cut for movement, not restriction. Ribbed collar and hem hold their shape drop after drop.
products.details: 400gsm premium cotton fleece. Dropped shoulder, ribbed collar and hem. Embroidered Corso mark on chest. Relaxed fit — true to size.
products.care: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print.

products.name: Legacy Jacket
products.desc: Heavyweight shell built to be handed down. Structured collar, snap placket, and a fit that holds its line.
products.details: Heavyweight quilted-lined shell. Snap placket, structured collar, interior pocket. True to size.
products.care: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low. Do not iron print.

products.name: SCCC Tactical Harness
products.desc: A structured tactical harness built for the guardian breed. Weather-shell construction, embroidered chest crest, hardware rated for real work.
products.details: Weather-resistant shell over padded core. Embroidered SCCC chest crest panel. D-ring hardware, adjustable straps, tricolor edge stitching.
products.care: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Air dry. Do not machine wash.

shipping_returns: Complimentary shipping over $150. 30-day returns on unworn items with tags.
